item.title: Inspired by Indian Khajoor Doodh or Chai, this warming date drink is going viral and has roots in India, Persia and across the Middle East. I’ve posted the full step by step recipe and instructions for this exact version at PlantYou dot com. #recipe #pla

item.title: #ad How I get 20g of protein before 8am with @lovemysilk. Silk just released their new protein line which gives you a whopping 13g of complete plant protein in ONE SERVING! I love to use it to bump up the protein in my smoothies. Find it at a retailer nea

item.title: 🍒THE CHERRY CALM MOCKTAIL with @Vimergy AD . Cherry Concentrate 1 cup frozen cherries 1/4 cup water Simmer your cherries on low for 8 to 10 minutes, until the cherries break down. Lightly mash, then strain, keeping the liquid in a bottle for your night ca

item.title: Olive oil caramel with @Pompeian! AD This viral recipe will truly blow your mind. Just combine equal parts maple syrup and olive oil (I used a 1/4 cup of each) and then whisk until it thickens slightly. For a thicker caramel, use cold maple syrup from the
item.description: Olive oil caramel with @Pompeian! AD This viral recipe will truly blow your mind. Just combine equal parts maple syrup and olive oil (I used a 1/4 cup of each) and then whisk until it thickens slightly. For a thicker caramel, use cold maple syrup from the
